title: Implement secure Azure solutions
summary: Learn how to more securely deploy apps in Azure by using Azure Key Vault, managed identities, and Azure App Configuration.

sections.title: Implement secure Azure solutions
sections.summary: Learn how to more securely deploy apps in Azure by using Azure Key Vault, managed identities, and Azure App Configuration.

lessons.title: Implement Azure Key Vault
lessons.content_md:
Implement Azure Key Vault

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-azure-key-vault/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement Azure App Configuration
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure App Configuration service to centrally manage and secure your configuration settings, and to manage app features.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-azure-app-configuration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement secure Azure solutions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement secure Azure solutions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
